ddls:
CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "roll_no" INTEGER /* Roll number assigned to each student */,
  "enrollment_no" TEXT /* Enrollment number assigned to each student */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Student's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Student's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Student's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Student's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Student's address */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Student's date of birth */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Student's gender */,
  "program" TEXT /* Student's program of study */,
  "year_of_admission" INTEGER /* Year of admission */,
  "status" TEXT /* Student's current status (e.g., Enrolled, Graduated, Withdrawn) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student associated with this result */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course for which the result is recorded */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result status (e.g., PASS, FAIL) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade achieved by the student (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "percentage" TEXT /* Percentage score */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester in which the result was recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the result was recorded */,
  "date_recorded" TEXT /* Date when the result was recorded */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or comments regarding the student's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits associated with the course */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department offering the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the instructor teaching the course */,
  "prerequisites" TEXT /* Prerequisite courses required for enrollment */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES instructors ("instructor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment record */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student enrolled in the course */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the course in which the student is enrolled */,
  "semester" TEXT /* The semester during which the course is taken */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Final grade for the course (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Enrollment status (e.g., Active, Completed, Dropped) */,
  "date_enrolled" TEXT /* Date when the student enrolled in the course */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date when the student completed the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instructors" (
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instructor */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* Instructor's first name */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Instructor's last name */,
  "email" TEXT /* Instructor's email address */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Instructor's phone number */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the instructor belongs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instructor_id")
)
